title: VAPT Combined Framework (TechGuard)
description: Meta-framework synthesising OWASP WSTG 4.2, OWASP API Security Top 10 (2023), OWASP ASVS 4.0.3, and PTES v1.1 for unified vulnerability assessment and penetration testing.

controls.title: Pre-engagement: Scope and Authorisation
controls.text: Written authorisation, rules of engagement, testing window, and scope definition must be established before any testing begins.
controls.evidence_expectation: Signed scope document; written authorisation; RoE document
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify all pre-engagement docs signed before testing starts

controls.title: Information Gathering and Reconnaissance
controls.text: Passive OSINT and active reconnaissance to map the complete attack surface including all in-scope assets, technologies, exposed services, and potential entry points.
controls.evidence_expectation: OSINT report; DNS enumeration; nmap scan; Shodan/Censys results; technology fingerprinting
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify comprehensive coverage of all in-scope assets; cross-check discovered vs declared scope

controls.title: Configuration and Infrastructure Security
controls.text: Assessment of server configuration, security headers, TLS/SSL settings, unnecessary services, cloud misconfigurations, and container security.
controls.evidence_expectation: Security headers report; TLS scan output; service enumeration; cloud config review
controls.assessment_procedure: Review security headers, TLS configuration, exposed services, and infrastructure hardening

controls.title: Authentication and Account Security
controls.text: Testing of all authentication mechanisms including password policy, MFA, brute-force protection, account lockout, OAuth/OIDC flows, JWT security, and credential reset processes.
controls.evidence_expectation: Authentication test results; MFA bypass attempts; lockout policy verification; JWT analysis
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all auth entry points; verify MFA enforced; test credential reset flows; analyse JWT algorithms and secret strength

controls.title: Authorisation and Access Control
controls.text: Horizontal and vertical privilege escalation testing including IDOR/BOLA, BFLA, missing object-level authorisation, mass assignment, and role boundary enforcement.
controls.evidence_expectation: IDOR test cases; role boundary violation proof; privilege escalation evidence; mass assignment results
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all data objects for cross-account access; test function-level authorisation; verify deny-by-default; test mass assignment via extra body parameters

controls.title: Injection Vulnerabilities
controls.text: Testing for all injection classes: SQL, NoSQL, OS command, LDAP, XML/XXE, template injection, expression language injection, and GraphQL injection.
controls.evidence_expectation: Injection test payloads and responses; successful injection proof-of-concept; affected endpoints
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all input parameters with injection payloads; use automated scanning plus manual verification; test in all contexts (JSON, XML, form data, headers)

controls.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
controls.text: Testing for reflected, stored, and DOM-based XSS across all user-controlled inputs, with verification of Content Security Policy effectiveness.
controls.evidence_expectation: XSS proof-of-concept; CSP bypass attempts; DOM XSS source-sink analysis
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all inputs for XSS in HTML/JS/CSS contexts; test CSP bypass; DOM XSS source-to-sink tracing; test stored XSS in all persistent data fields

controls.title: Session Management
controls.text: Session token entropy, secure/httponly flags, fixation, hijacking, logout invalidation, and concurrent session handling.
controls.evidence_expectation: Session token analysis; logout invalidation test; fixation test results
controls.assessment_procedure: Analyse token entropy; verify secure/httponly flags; test logout invalidation; test session fixation; verify idle timeout

controls.title: API Security (OWASP API10)
controls.text: Full OWASP API Security Top 10 coverage including BOLA, broken auth, property-level authorisation, rate limiting, BFLA, SSRF, misconfiguration, injection, inventory, and unsafe API consumption.
controls.evidence_expectation: Full API endpoint inventory; API10 test results per category
controls.assessment_procedure: Map all API endpoints; test each OWASP API10 category; verify rate limits; test mass assignment; test CORS policy

controls.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
controls.text: Testing for SSRF vulnerabilities in URL-accepting inputs, file fetch parameters, webhooks, and import functionality that may allow access to internal services or cloud metadata.
controls.evidence_expectation: SSRF proof-of-concept; internal service access evidence; cloud metadata access; DNS callback confirmation
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all URL-accepting parameters with internal IPs, metadata endpoints, and localhost; test protocol variations; use out-of-band detection; test blind SSRF

controls.title: Cryptography and TLS
controls.text: TLS protocol versions, cipher suites, certificate validity, key exchange, HSTS, certificate pinning, and cryptographic implementation quality in the application.
controls.evidence_expectation: testssl.sh or SSLyze output; certificate analysis; cipher suite grading
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all TLS endpoints; verify no SSL3/TLS1.0/1.1; check cipher suite strength; verify certificate chain; verify HSTS with sufficient max-age

controls.title: Third-Party Components and Supply Chain
controls.text: Identification and assessment of vulnerable or outdated third-party libraries, frameworks, plugins, and external dependencies, including CVE correlation.
controls.evidence_expectation: Dependency scan output; CVE list; technology version inventory; SCA results
controls.assessment_procedure: Run SCA tools against discovered technologies; correlate versions with NVD CVE database; identify end-of-life components; verify patch management cadence

categories.business_logic: Business logic flaws and workflow abuse
